parameters.command:
docker ps --format "automation-01|{{.Names}}|{{.Status}}" || true
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 10.0.0.33 'docker ps --format "docker-01|{{.Names}}|{{.Status}}"' || echo "docker-01|OFFLINE"
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 10.0.0.35 'docker ps --format "colmado-db|{{.Names}}|{{.Status}}"' || echo "colmado-db|OFFLINE"
